name: serena
description: Connects the Serena MCP server to Claude Code.

interface.shortDescription: Semantic code tools for Claude Code via Serena MCP.
interface.longDescription: Starts the Serena MCP server in Claude Code-compatible mode so Claude Code can use Serena's semantic retrieval and editing tools.
defaultPrompt: Install Serena if it is missing from this machine.
Activate Serena for the current project.
Use Serena to inspect code semantically.
Use Serena editing tools for targeted refactors.
